headline: Regency Centers to Present at Nareit REITweek 2026 Investor Conference
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency Centers” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq:REG) today announced that the Company’s management team is scheduled to present at the Nareit REITweek Investor Conference on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 3:15 pm ET. To listen to the presentation, please use the webcast information provided below. A link to the webcast will be available for replay on the Investor Relations page of the Company’s website at investors.regencyc
